questions.question: Does BackupScheduler enforce a 5-minute debounce between publishes?
Does markDirty(true) publish immediately when outside the debounce window?
Does dispose() clean up timers and prevent further publishes?
Does MarmotContext call markDirty(true) after createGroup, leaveGroup, inviteByNpub?
Does ProfileContext call markDirty(true) after saveProfile?
Does BackupContext set up a visibilitychange listener to trigger backup on page hide?
